stepBody:
Encode the following message using a Caesar shift of 6 to the right: THE CAESAR CIPHER IS NAMED FOR JULIUS CAESAR WHO USED IT WITH A SHIFT OF THREE. 
Shift each letter forward to create the encoded version.
stepAnswer: ZNK IGKYGX IOVNKX OY TGSKJ LUX PAROAY IGKYGX CNU AYKJ OZ COZN G YNOLZ UL ZNXKK
